betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cakes§f

§aBake placeable cake blocks that serve multiple slices.§f

Cakes are crafted in the §bBakeware§f and placed as blocks. Each cake serves §e4-8 slices§f. Slice hunger varies by type.

§6Cakes§f:
§b•§f Carrot Cake — 5 hunger/slice
§b•§f Cheesecake — 5 hunger/slice
§b•§f Cherry Cheesecake — 6 hunger/slice
§b•§f Chocolate Sprinkle Cake — 8 hunger/slice
§b•§f Holiday Cake — 6 hunger/slice
§b•§f Lamington — 4 hunger/slice
§b•§f Pavlova — 6 hunger/slice
§b•§f Pineapple Upside Down Cake — 6 hunger/slice
§b•§f Pumpkin Cheesecake — 6 hunger/slice
§b•§f Red Velvet Cake — 6 hunger/slice

§eTip:§f Chocolate Sprinkle Cake at 8 hunger per slice is the best cake for pure hunger restoration.
